title: gnaphalium luteoalbum var. multiceps
intro: Gnaphalium luteoalbum var. multiceps, also known as the Jerusalem sage or multiflorous cudweed, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gnaphalium luteoalbum var. multiceps include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin conditions, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
